header.title: Laundry Log
header.subtitle: Track what goes out to the laundry and what comes back for each property.

landing.description: Phone-first linen and towel handoff tracking by property.

form.helper: Save the record when the laundry leaves, then reopen it to confirm what came back.

empty.returns: No return records match the current filters.

empty.records: No records match the current filters.

header.title: Welcome Packs
header.subtitle: Track material cost, property charges, and profit

hero.body: The workflow is now split into three clear jobs: define the material costs, register what you charged at each property, and let the calculations view show totals and margin for you.

materialCosts.label: Material Costs
materialCosts.description: Add every material you buy and fill in stock, cost, and the usual charge per unit.

propertyCharges.label: Property Charges
propertyCharges.description: Choose the property, add the materials used in that pack, and confirm what you actually charged.

calculations.label: Calculations
calculations.description: Open the calculations view to check totals, profit, and property performance automatically.

help.title: Welcome Pack Manager Guide
help.subtitle: Learn how to manage packs, reservations, and inventory.

checkReservations.title: Check Reservations
checkReservations.body: Open Reservations to review upcoming check-ins and see which properties will need a welcome pack soon.

logPack.title: Log a Pack
logPack.body: Open Property Charges, select the property and date, then add the materials used or load a preset as a starting point.

saveMonitor.title: Save & Monitor
saveMonitor.body: After saving, stock is updated and the pack cost, charge, and profit are reflected in the calculations area automatically.

stats.title: Calculations & Stats
stats.body: The calculations view gives you a financial overview of what each pack cost, what was charged, and how each property performed.

margin.label: Profit Margin:
margin.body: Calculated as (Profit / Charged Amount) * 100. Higher margin means the welcome pack is more profitable.

trends.label: Property View:
trends.body: Use the property table and recent charges list to see where margin is strongest and fix older entries when needed.

stock.title: Managing Stock
stock.body: Use Material Costs to add materials, keep stock up to date, and define the usual cost and suggested charge for each item.

presets.title: Using Presets
presets.body: Use Presets to save your standard welcome pack so recurring property charges can be logged faster.

upcoming.title: Future Bookings
upcoming.summary: {{enabled}} of {{total}} properties have Welcome Pack enabled
upcoming.noEnabledTitle: No properties have welcome pack enabled
upcoming.noEnabledBody: Go to Property Settings to enable welcome pack tracking for your properties.
upcoming.noUpcomingTitle: No check-ins in the next {{count}} days
upcoming.noUpcomingBody: Reservations will appear here when guests book.

settings.title: Welcome Pack Properties
settings.summary: {{enabled}} of {{total}} properties have welcome pack enabled
settings.bannerTitle: Configure which properties need welcome packs
settings.bannerBody: Search for a property below and enable welcome pack tracking. Only enabled properties will appear in the Upcoming Reservations list.
settings.searchPlaceholder: Search for a property to enable or disable...
settings.startTyping: Start typing to search for a property
settings.emptyTitle: No properties have welcome pack enabled yet

modal.emptySummary: Select items to see pack composition

dashboard.title: Profit by period
dashboard.description: Use the date filter to see how much the packs cost, how much you charged, and which properties performed best.
dashboard.propertyPerformanceDescription: Each row compares material cost, charged amount, and net profit by property.

trends.title: Recent charge trend
trends.description: Review the last seven active days to spot when charged amounts and profit were strongest.

materials.title: Most used materials
materials.description: These are the items consuming stock fastest in the selected period.

dashboard.recentChargesDescription: Review what was charged at each property and adjust older entries if a value was wrong.
dashboard.noChargesDescription: After you add a charge in Property Charges, the latest entries will appear here.

inventory.title: Material catalogue
inventory.description: Keep one row per material with the current stock, the net cost to Atlantic Holiday, and the usual charge used in a welcome pack.

metrics.stockCostValueDescription: Based on the net material cost

inventory.emptyDescription: Add your first material so the Property Charges and Calculations screens can work from it.

log.title: Register a property charge
log.description: Select the property, choose the materials used in the pack, and confirm the amount you actually charged.
log.entriesDescription: Add one or more property/date rows. All rows use the same selected materials, but each row can have its own property, date, and charged amount.
log.loadPresetPlaceholder: Select a preset to load materials...
log.loadPresetHelp: Presets help you drop in your standard pack before adjusting the actual materials used.
log.materialsDescription: Add the materials that were actually used for this property. Repeated clicks increase the quantity.
log.noMaterialsDescription: Open Material Costs first and add the materials that can be used in a welcome pack.
log.summaryDescription: The amount charged can follow the suggested value or be edited manually if a property was billed differently.

history.noPropertyDescription: Select a property to see the last recorded welcome pack charge.
history.noPreviousCharge: No previous welcome pack charge was found for this property.

log.editHint: Updating an existing charge will restore the old stock and deduct the new quantities again.
log.saveHint: The calculation screen will update automatically after you save {{count}} charge(s).

messages.selectMaterial: Please select at least one material
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save pack. Please try again.
messages.confirmDeleteCharge: Are you sure you want to delete this charge? Stock will be restored.
messages.confirmDeleteMaterial: Are you sure you want to delete this material?

header.title: Cleaning AH
header.subtitle: Track checkout revenue, laundry costs, and quick stats in one place.
header.restrictedBody: This page stores company revenue data, so it is only visible to admins and managers.

landing.description: Checkout revenue, laundry, and importable stats.

formula.title: Category-based cleaning rules.
formula.body: Check-out uses the normal 22% extracted VAT rule, with 15.5% commission only on platform reservations. Owner check-outs and first cleanings skip platform commission, while mid-term cleanings track saved cost with no commission or VAT. Laundry uses 2.60 EUR per kg whether you enter it on the cleaning or add it later.

categoryRules.checkout: Platform or Direct applies only to check-out rows. VAT is extracted and laundry stays optional.
categoryRules.ownerCheckout: Owner check-outs skip platform commission. Enter the charged amount and add laundry only when needed.
categoryRules.firstCleaning: First cleanings skip platform commission. VAT still applies, and laundry can be added only when it exists.
categoryRules.midTerm: Mid-term cleanings use the amount field as saved cleaning-company cost. There is no platform commission and no VAT, so only laundry reduces the final net.

cleanings.description: Choose Platform or Direct, save the checkout, and optionally enter laundry kg right away. You can still add linked laundry later from Stored data or the Laundry tab.
cleanings.batchDescription: Use one shared date, category, and reservation source to save several checkout rows at once. Each row can also include laundry kg, and property pricing is suggested automatically from the latest saved cleaning for that property.
cleanings.batchHint: Use batch entry when you have many same-day check-outs. You can still adjust notes, guest amount, and laundry kg on each row before saving, while Platform or Direct applies to the whole batch.
cleanings.quickLaundryHint: This saves a linked laundry row for this cleaning and it also appears in the Laundry tab.
cleanings.storedDescription: Use Show and Order by to focus on rows that already have laundry linked or are still waiting on laundry.
cleanings.empty: No cleaning records match the current filters.

laundryTab.description: Use this when laundry needs to be tracked separately from a checkout cleaning. Amount is calculated automatically as kilograms multiplied by the rate you set below.
laundryTab.vatNote: Laundry prices and amounts shown here do not include 22% VAT.
laundryTab.batchDescription: Use one shared date and one shared rate per kg to save several laundry rows at once. This is faster when you have many properties on the same day.
laundryTab.batchHint: Use batch entry for same-day laundry across many properties. If needed, you can link rows to cleanings later.
laundryTab.empty: No laundry records match the current filters.

forms.linkedCleaningHint: Link the laundry to an earlier cleaning so the final net revenue updates when the kg arrives.

import.title: Import historical CSV
import.description: Import the existing checkout sheet, skip duplicates by fingerprint, and review mismatches before saving.
import.empty: Select a CSV file to preview how many rows will be imported and how many will be skipped as duplicates.
import.mismatchWarning: {{count}} rows have formula mismatches. They will still be imported with the sheet values preserved.

tables.noData: No data for the current filters.

status.cleaningValidationError: Date and property are required for a cleaning record.
status.cleaningSaveFailed: Cleaning record could not be saved.
status.cleaningBatchValidationError: Enter a date and complete property plus amount for each cleaning row you want to save.
status.cleaningBatchSaveFailed: Cleaning rows could not be saved.
status.linkedLaundryValidationError: Enter a date and kg to save linked laundry.
status.laundryValidationError: Date and property are required for a laundry record.
status.laundrySaveFailed: Laundry record could not be saved.
status.laundryBatchValidationError: Enter a date and complete property plus kg for each laundry row you want to save.
status.laundryBatchSaveFailed: Laundry rows could not be saved.
status.laundryLinkSaveFailed: Laundry link could not be updated.
status.csvPreviewReady: Parsed {{count}} CSV rows. Review the preview before importing.
status.csvPreviewFailed: CSV preview failed. Check the file format and try again.
status.noNewRowsToImport: There are no new rows to import.
status.csvImportFailed: CSV import failed while saving to Firestore.
status.cleaningDeletedWithLinked: Cleaning record deleted. {{count}} linked laundry rows were unlinked.
status.cleaningDeleteFailed: Cleaning record could not be deleted.
status.laundryDeleteFailed: Laundry record could not be deleted.

confirm.deleteCleaningWithLinked: Delete this cleaning record? {{count}} linked laundry rows will be kept and unlinked.

users.title: Existing Users
users.description: Manage login access, assign roles, and keep colleague permissions consistent across admin, self-service, and shared-tablet flows.

create.title: Add New Access
create.description: Create a new login with a temporary password, then link the same email to the colleague profile and trigger a reset email.
create.help: Use a strong temporary password. The user should switch to their own password through email reset.

testUsers.title: Test Users
testUsers.description: Create one safe test login for each preset role. These are meant for checking what each access level sees in the app.

accessOverview.title: Colleague Access Links
accessOverview.description: This shows whether each staff profile is linked to a login, and whether that login is self-service, shared-station, privileged, or has selected app access.
accessOverview.passwordFlow: Password flow: create access with a temporary password, set the same email on the colleague record, then use Reset Password so the colleague chooses their own password by email.

help.missingEmail: Add the same email the colleague will use to sign in.
help.missingAccess: Create access for this email in User Management.
help.clockOnly: This user opens only the time clock and the read-only work schedule.
help.appAccess: This user keeps time clock access and can also open the selected dashboard apps.
help.station: This login opens the shared tablet picker so any colleague can clock in or out.
help.privileged: This user opens the full manager workspace, including scheduling and admin tools.
help.unknown: Review this colleague record and assigned access.

appAccess.title: App Access
appAccess.emptyNote: No extra apps selected. This colleague keeps only time clock and self-service schedule access.
appAccess.privilegedNote: Privileged roles keep full app access.
appAccess.stationNote: Shared station logins do not use dashboard app access.
appAccess.legacyNote: This older access login keeps the full dashboard until you choose a smaller set.

goLive.title: Time Clock Go-Live Checklist
goLive.description: Use this before switching the team to the live clock.
goLive.important: Important: the tablet account should stay signed in on the shared device. Colleagues should only pick their name and save punches there; they should not sign in and out with personal passwords on the tablet.

items.1: Create one dedicated tablet login and assign it the time-clock-station role.
items.2: Keep each colleague on their own access login or linked employee record. The tablet account is shared only for the station picker.
items.3: Sign in on the tablet with the station account and confirm it opens the shared colleague picker and defaults to Portuguese.
items.4: Test one full attendance cycle on the tablet: clock in, start break, end break, and clock out.
items.5: Confirm the screen returns to the colleague list after a saved punch and that search still finds colleagues quickly.
items.6: As a manager, verify the attendance print view, weekly and monthly switching, and one manual correction with a valid reason.
items.7: Toggle the browser offline and online once to confirm the sync banner changes and punches recover correctly after reconnecting.
items.8: Do a live pilot with one or two trusted colleagues before the full rollout.

roles.title: Roles
roles.empty: No roles created yet. Choose a preset from the dropdowns below to add one.
roles.noteBody: Admin, Manager, and Supervisor currently open the same privileged workspace in the app. Keep different names only if your team needs them operationally.

admin.title: Administrator
admin.description: Privileged workspace access. Use for people who need the full management and setup surface.

manager.title: Manager
manager.description: Privileged workspace access. Operationally labeled for managers, but currently has the same app access as admin and supervisor.

supervisor.title: Supervisor
supervisor.description: Privileged workspace access. Good for lead staff, but currently opens the same privileged area as admin and manager.

employee.title: Employee
employee.description: Self-service access only. Opens the employee time clock and the read-only work schedule.

timeClockStation.title: Time Clock Station
timeClockStation.description: Shared tablet login. Opens the colleague picker for a common device instead of a personal account.

schedule.title: Work Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Team calendar, staffing and vacation planning

navigation.subtitle: Choose a planning view or open a reference view.

workspace.heading: Planning workspace
workspace.title: Keep coverage, leave, and staffing in one view.
workspace.lead: Use the planning views for day-to-day decisions and the reference views for yearly review and local holiday context.

selfService.navigationSubtitle: This work schedule is read-only for colleagues.
selfService.accessBannerTitle: You are viewing the read-only work schedule.
selfService.accessBannerBody: Schedule edits, leave planning, and exports stay manager-only. Use this view to check the live team rota without opening any management tools.
selfService.readOnlyDayNotice: This daily schedule is read-only for colleague accounts.

viewDescriptions.monthly: Scan staffing day by day, spot absences fast, and open any date for adjustments.
viewDescriptions.yearly: Review month-by-month totals for worked days, leave, absences, and extra hours.
viewDescriptions.vacationBoard: Share a read-only leave map by colleague, month, and department before anyone books time away.
viewDescriptions.vacation: Review upcoming leave, book ranges, and keep the team aligned before approving time away.
viewDescriptions.stats: Check leave balances and yearly totals before exporting data for payroll or planning.
viewDescriptions.madeiraHolidays: Reference local public holidays and major island events while planning coverage.

modals.dailyNotePlaceholder: Add a note for this day (e.g. 'Bank Holiday', 'VIP Arrival')...
modals.noExtraHours: No extra hours or notes for this period.

vacation.title: Vacation Planner
vacation.subtitle: Visualise and manage team vacations
vacation.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this vacation?
vacation.selectDatesError: Please select a colleague and dates.
vacation.invalidRangeError: Please select a valid date range.

board.title: Team Vacation Board
board.subtitle: Read-only leave map for planning around each other before new vacations are booked.
board.navigationSubtitle: This shared board stays read-only. Use filters and year switching to plan around each other.
board.accessBannerTitle: You are viewing the read-only vacation board.
board.accessBannerBody: Booking and schedule edits stay manager-only. Use filters and the yearly timeline to see when teammates are away before requesting your own leave.
board.emptyBody: Try a different search or department, or switch year to review other vacation plans.
board.readOnlyNote: This board stays read-only so colleagues can coordinate leave without touching schedule data.
board.noUpcoming: No upcoming vacations in this view.
board.timeClockHint: Check team vacations before planning leave.

madeira.title: Madeira Calendar
madeira.subtitle: Public holidays and cultural events in Madeira
madeira.officialDesc: On these days, all colleagues are automatically marked as not working
madeira.autoManagementDesc: On these days, all colleagues are automatically marked as not working. You can manually override individual colleagues if needed.
madeira.eventsSubtitle: Major celebrations throughout the year that may affect traffic, demand, or staffing.
madeira.eventsNoteText: These are cultural events rather than official public holidays. Colleagues may still be scheduled unless you adjust coverage manually.

staff.title: Staff Management
staff.subtitle: Manage team members
staff.description: Keep colleague profiles, working days, and archive history aligned from one workspace.
staff.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this colleague?
staff.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this colleague?
staff.deletePermanentConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this colleague? This cannot be undone.

active.title: Active colleagues
active.description: Review default schedules and update colleague profiles before changing the live roster.

archive.title: Archived colleagues
archive.description: Restore former colleagues or permanently remove records that should no longer stay in the archive.

timeClock.cardDescription: Clock in, take breaks and clock out.

landing.stationSubtitle: Use the shared tablet picker to select any colleague and record shifts, breaks, and clock-out times.
landing.clockOnlyFallbackTitle: Clock in and out for your shift
landing.clockOnlySubtitle: Use the digital time clock to record shifts, breaks, and open the read-only work schedule when you need it.

status.notLinkedTitle: Ask an admin to link your employee email before using the time clock.
status.clockedOutTitle: You are not currently clocked in.

sync.syncedDetailWithTime: Attendance data is syncing normally. Last confirmed sync at {{time}}.
sync.pendingDetail: Recent changes are saved locally and still syncing to the cloud.
sync.cachedDetail: Showing cached attendance data while reconnecting.
sync.cachedDetailWithTime: Showing cached attendance data while reconnecting. Last confirmed sync at {{time}}.
sync.offlineDetail: You are offline. New punches can save locally and sync once the connection returns.
sync.offlinePendingDetail: You are offline and there are attendance changes waiting to sync.
sync.errorDetail: Attendance sync needs review before relying on this device for live punching.

station.title: Tap your name to continue
station.description: Use the shared tablet to find a colleague, open the action panel, and save the next clock event in one tap.
station.idleResetDetail: The station returns to the colleague list after {{seconds}} seconds of inactivity.
station.idleResetNotice: The station reset after inactivity. Search and selection were cleared for the next colleague.
station.directoryDescription: Search by name, staff number, department, or position. Only active colleagues appear in the shared station.
station.noMatches: No colleagues matched that search. Try a different name or staff number.
station.savedSharedLog: Saved to the shared attendance log.
station.nextPunchHint: Use the main button to record the next punch.
station.defaultFeedback: Use one action only once. After a successful save, the station returns to the colleague list automatically.
station.feedbackSaved: {{action}} saved for {{name}}. Returning to the colleague list...
station.tileReadyDetail: Tap to record the next attendance action.
station.noActiveShift: No active shift block is open right now.
station.autoLunchHint: Single-block days of 06:00 or longer still auto-deduct 01:00 for lunch when no break punches are recorded.

selfService.lockedHint: You can still use the manager review tools below, but employee self-service will stay locked until an active colleague profile is linked to your login email.
selfService.autoLunchHint: Single-block workdays of 06:00 or longer automatically deduct 01:00 for lunch when no break punches are recorded.
selfService.registerHint: The website stores clock-in, clock-out, breaks, and manual adjustments in a weekly register that managers can review or print when needed.
selfService.scheduleHint: Check the live work schedule in read-only mode.
selfService.noLinkedSchedule: No linked colleague schedule available yet.
selfService.savedImmediate: Saved immediately to the attendance log.
selfService.noBreakRecorded: No break recorded for this day.
selfService.noPunchesForDay: No punches recorded for this day.
selfService.managerReviewDescription: Use this panel for missed punches, reconstructed entries, and days that still need review before export.
selfService.addManualEventDescription: Use this only for missed punches or reviewed corrections. Every manual entry is flagged for review.
selfService.correctionRequirement: Reason required. Use at least {{count}} characters so the adjustment can be audited.

print.title: Attendance Print View
print.subtitle: Printable weekly or monthly registo de tempos de trabalho from the digital clock log.
print.emptyTitle: No colleagues found. Add staff before printing an attendance register.
print.selectPrompt: Select a colleague to open the attendance print view.
print.instructions: Article 202 of the Labour Code: start, end, interruptions/breaks, hours per day and per week, with signature/approval when applicable.
print.instructionsDetail: Fill in the real start times, excluded breaks, and end times. For work outside the workplace, collect the signature/approval and keep the approved register within the legal retention period.
print.retentionNote: Keep this register for 5 years. If overtime exists, the grounds must be identified in the register.

feedback.savedOffline: {{action}} saved locally. It will sync when the connection returns.
feedback.manualSaved: Manual event saved and flagged for review.
feedback.manualSaveFailed: Failed to save the manual event.
feedback.manualReasonRequired: Enter a clear correction reason with at least 8 characters before saving a manual attendance event.
feedback.manualActorRequired: Sign in again before saving manual attendance changes so the correction stays attributable.
feedback.reviewFailed: Failed to mark the record as reviewed.

errors.employeeNotFound: Employee not found for the attendance record.

errors.reviewEmployeeNotFound: Employee not found for attendance review.
